mechanism_narrative: Sustained low federal funds rates compress equity discount rates and lower corporate borrowing costs, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: SPX 20-day forward returns are negative in > 55% of observations when FEDFUNDS remains below 0.25%.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly unemployment rate decline exceeding 0.5 percentage points signals accelerating labor market recovery, which drives positive equity returns over a quarter as earnings expectations improve.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns are negative in > 60% of months following a UNRATE decline greater than 0.5 percentage points.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent month-over-month growth in retail sales and housing starts confirms broad consumer demand expansion, producing positive equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Joint positive MoM growth in RSAFS and HOUST coincides with negative 20-day SPX returns in > 50% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Rapid industrial production acceleration during the reopening phase signals supply chain normalization, triggering short-term positive equity repricing over five trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are negative when INDPRO MoM growth exceeds 1.0% during the reopening phase.

mechanism_narrative: Rising consumer price index levels above 0.4% month-over-month signal inflationary pressure that compresses equity valuations, generating negative forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns are positive in > 65% of observations when CPIAUCSL MoM exceeds 0.4%.

mechanism_narrative: Higher quarterly gross domestic product growth directly correlates with corporate revenue expansion, producing positive equity returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: Positive GDPC1 quarter-over-quarter growth coincides with negative 60-day SPX returns in > 55% of quarters.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between rising total nonfarm payrolls and falling unemployment rate confirms genuine labor market absorption, driving positive equity momentum over the next month.
failure_condition: Simultaneous PAYEMS increase and UNRATE decrease yields negative 20-day forward returns in > 50% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production index crossing above 105.0 signals capacity utilization recovery, triggering short-term positive equity flows over five trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are negative in > 60% of months when INDPRO crosses above the 105.0 threshold.
